debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 v p ih : V
h : G.Adj v p
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G p ih
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert v (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
hv : v ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1
h_card_union :
  ({s(v, p)} ∪ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1).card =
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    (insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)).card

failed_attempts:
rw [h_support, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv),
          Finset.card_singleton, h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, ← Finset.insert_eq, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv]
        rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        rw [h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, ← Finset.insert_eq, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv, h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, h_edge, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv, h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv)]
        rw [h_edge, h_card_union, Finset.card_singleton, add_comm 1]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1
    exact h_ind

rw [h_support, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv, h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv),
            Finset.card_singleton, h_edge, h_card_union, add_comm 1]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv, h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, h_edge, h_card_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint]
        · simp only [Finset.card_singleton]
          rw [add_comm 1]
          exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1
        · simpa [Finset.disjoint_singleton_left] using hv

rw [h_support, h_edge, h_card_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv)]
        simp only [Finset.card_singleton]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, ← Finset.insert_eq, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv]
        rw [h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact Nat.add_le_add_right h_ind 1

rw [h_support, h_edge, h_card_union]
        rw [Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv)]
        linarith [h_ind]

rw [h_support, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hv), Finset.card_singleton, h_edge, h_card_union]
        linarith [h_ind]

rw [h_support, h_edge]
        rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hv]
        rw [h_card_union]
        exact add_le_add_right h_ind 1
